meaning: n.往返汽车(列车、飞机),航天飞机,梭子,穿梭v.穿梭往返
examples: The space shuttle Atlantis returned safely to Earth today.
The countdown has begun for the launch of the space shuttle.
There is a free 24-hour shuttle between the airport terminals.
If you do not have a suitable car, take the shuttle from the main car park.
Chinese students nowadays shuttle between China, EU, US like Canadians going to Tim Hortons for coffee.
